fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Summary Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies which type of line or entry is summarized in the entry summary.

fields.name: Total Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total quantity of the item in inventory.

fields.name: Total Reserved Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total quantity of the relevant item that is reserved on documents or entries of the type on the line.

fields.name: Total Available Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity available for the user to request, in entries of the type on the line.

fields.name: Current Reserved Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of items in the entry that are reserved for the line that the Reservation window is opened from.

fields.name: Source Subtype
fields.tooltip:
Indicates which source subtype the reservation entry is related to.

If the entry is related to a purchase or sales line, then the field is copied from the Document Type field on the line.


If the entry is related to a journal line, then the field is copied from the Entry Type field on the journal line.

fields.name: Qty. Alloc. in Warehouse
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity of the item that is allocated to activities in the warehouse.

Additional Information

Allocations in the warehouse include the following quantities:

Outstanding quantity on picks and inventory movements with source documents.


Quantity on outbound bins, such as:

Bins of type Shipment at locations that are set up with directed pick and put-away.


Default shipment bins at locations that are not set up with directed pick and put-away.


Warehouse adjustment bin.


Quantities that are reserved on pick and inventory movement lines and quantities that are picked and reserved but not shipped are shown in the Reserved Qty. on Picks and Shipments field.

fields.name: Res. Qty. on Picks & Shipmts.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the sum of the following overlap quantities:

Quantity reserved AND included on outstanding pick and inventory movement lines.


Quantity reserved AND picked but not shipped yet.


The value in this field is a subset of the value in the Qty. Allocated in Warehouse field.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number for which availability is presented in the Item Tracking Summary window.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number for which availability is presented in the Item Tracking Summary window.

fields.name: Warranty Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the warranty expiration date, if any, of the item carrying the item tracking number.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expiration date, if any, of the item carrying the item tracking number.

fields.name: Total Requested Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total quantity of the serial, lot or package number that is requested in all documents.

fields.name: Selected Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of each serial, lot or package number that you want to use to fulfill the demand for the transaction.

fields.name: Current Pending Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity from the item tracking line that is selected on the document but not yet committed to the database.

fields.name: Current Requested Quantity
fields.tooltip: Shows how much of the total requested quantity is requested on the current line.

fields.name: Bin Content
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item in the bin specified in the document line.

fields.name: Bin Active
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the bin content should be taken into account when calculating the available quantity on the item tracking line.

fields.name: Non-specific Reserved Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that is reserved but does not have specific item tracking numbers in the reservation.

fields.name: Double-entry Adjustment
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the package number for which availability is presented in the Item Tracking Summary window.
